name: Dark King Pen
description: Dark King Pen is the Dark counterpart of King Pen in Skylanders: Imaginators. He is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark Golden Queen and Dark Wolfgang.
biography: King Pen hails from a militaristic unit of penguins who protect the Cloudmelt Glaciers. During an epic battle, King Pen was trapped in an avalanche and had to take refuge in a nearby cave for the remainder of the winter season. During his solitude, he was visited by a mysterious Yeti Master, named Snow Wah, who began teaching him an ancient combat style known as 'Flipper-Fu'. King Pen was already a skilled fighter, but the wise teacher helped him to understand the spiritual and philosophical nature of warfare, turning the penguin into an unstoppable force. Shadow King Pen is an alter ego of King Pen, the respected leader of the Academy Sensei Group. As an outstanding warrior, Shadow King Pen was able to gain the attention of Master Eon and become a Skylander and an Academy sensei. However, he puts emphasis on being cold-headed and disciplined than being compassionate and on the results of physical training than spiritual training. The students are very afraid of Shadow King Pen, but he won't change his education policy.
personality: Shadow King Pen is cold-headed and disciplined. Unlike the original King Pen, he puts more emphasis on the results of physical training than spiritual training and is known for being less compassionate, making his students very afraid of him.

story.content: King Pen hails from a militaristic unit of penguins who protect the Cloudmelt Glaciers. During an epic battle, King Pen was trapped in an avalanche and had to take refuge in a nearby cave for the remainder of the winter season. During his solitude, he was visited by a mysterious Yeti Master, named Snow Wah, who began teaching him an ancient combat style known as 'Flipper-Fu'. King Pen was already a skilled fighter, but the wise teacher helped him to understand the spiritual and philosophical nature of warfare, turning the penguin into an unstoppable force. When he finally emerged from the cave, tales of his newfound abilities spread far and wide. When Master Eon caught wind, he recruited King Pen into his top secret training program, where he quickly rose up the ranks to become the leader of the Skylander Sensei. Years later, King Pen returned to the site of the avalanche to thank his teacher, but no evidence of Snow Wah or the cave was ever found – leaving many to wonder if the Yeti had ever existed at all.

Shadow King Pen is an alter ego of King Pen, the respected leader of the Academy Sensei Group. This is before King Pen met his Yeti Master Snow Wah who taught him the spiritual and philosophical foundation of battle. As an outstanding warrior, Shadow King Pen was able to gain the attention of Master Eon and become a Skylander and an Academy sensei. However, he puts emphasis on being cold-headed and disciplined than being compassionate and on the results of physical training than spiritual training. The students are very afraid of Shadow King Pen, but he won't change his education policy. The actual battle against the evil forces would be much more brutal.

trivia: He's the only Dark Sensei who is not a former villain.
When Ring of Heroes got rebooted, Shadow King Pen was temporarily absent until June 2021.

trailers.name: MAÎTRE GIMS DONNE DE LA VOIX DANS SKYLANDERS IMAGINATORS!

gameplay: Dark King Pen is a Brawler Sensei who specializes in close-quarters combat using 'Flipper-Fu'. He can also utilize ice-based attacks to freeze enemies and create defensive arenas. In the Ring of Heroes, he is a disciplined warrior capable of stealing effects like Provoke and transferring debuffs to enemies.

basic.name: Penguin Combo
basic.content: Inflicts 48% of ATK as damage to 1 enemy 2 times, and steals the [Provoke] Effect that's possessed by the target whenever you attack accurately.

basic.name: Frost Breath
basic.content: A chilling breath of frost that damages enemies in front of Dark King Pen.

basic_upgrades.name: Penguin Drill
basic_upgrades.content: Inflicts 127% of ATK as damage to 1 enemy and grants the [Provoke] Effect on yourself for 1 turn.

basic_upgrades.name: Ice Charge Lvl 1: Ice Arena
basic_upgrades.content: A powerful move that creates an icy arena to trap and damage foes.

soulgems.name: Break Ice Black
soulgems.content: Increases the cooldown time required to use the skill by 1 when you use the skill with the Freeze Effect granted.
